codeReview.summary: The fix correctly updates getStatusBadgeColor() to use the new status_tanaman values (TM, TBM, TTM, TLS) instead of the old values (aktif, tidak_aktif, dalam_perawatan). Badge color mappings are correct: TM=bg-green-100/text-green-800, TBM=bg-blue-100/text-blue-800, TTM=bg-orange-100/text-orange-800, TLS=bg-red-100/text-red-800.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The handoff documents a non-blocking discovered issue: backend database queries in kasDatabase.ts, gudangDatabase.ts, and bankDatabase.ts still reference 'aktif' status when filtering blok records. This is outside the scope of this fix but should be tracked as a separate issue.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: handoff.discoveredIssues[0]: 'Backend database queries in kasDatabase.ts, gudangDatabase.ts, and bankDatabase.ts still reference aktif status when filtering blok records'

summary: Fix is correct and complete. The getStatusBadgeColor switch statement now correctly maps TM→green, TBM→blue, TTM→orange, TLS→red. The call site at line 470 passes blok.status_tanaman correctly. No issues found.
